We know that our products make a real difference to our clients and their families.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>The Role | </strong>Reporting to the Pharmacist Operations Manager and the Head Pharmacy Technician of CG Health, you will be required to work independently in a dynamic fast-paced environment while being responsible for daily and on-going technician and store duties. Other duties and responsibilities include:</p><p><br></p><ul><li>Perform all the duties of a Pharmacy Technician in an efficient and professional manner</li><li>Possess an in-depth knowledge of all prescription and over the counter (OTC) products</li><li>Receive medicine orders, complete data entry and prepare prescriptions while maintaining efficient workflow management</li><li>Accurate technical completion of Monitored Dosage System packs</li><li>Inventory management, including monitoring inventory levels, rotation of stock and checking expiry dates</li><li>Resolve customer queries in an efficient and customer-first manner</li><li>Develop positive and professional relationships with all customers and vendors</li><li>Insurance billing of prescription claims to insurance companies, tracking and clearing insurance payments and resolving discrepancies</li><li>Effective stock-management and procurement of pharmaceuticals and Pharmacy supplies from overseas and local wholesalers in a timely manner</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>The Person | </strong>To be the ideal candidate you must have:</p><p><br></p><ul><li>Successful completion of Pharmacy Technician Degree from an accredited program</li><li>A minimum of 3 yearsâ retail pharmacy technician experience</li><li>Knowledge of all laws and regulations governing pharmacy in Bermuda</li><li>Comprehensive knowledge of Rx30, including Bermuda insurance billings</li><li>Experience with Monitored Dosage System Packs</li><li>Ability to handle a fast-paced dispensary operation</li><li>Ability to work as part of a team and to take directions from other staff members</li><li>Ability to work 12-hour shifts, weekends &amp; public holidays and be available for after-hours deliveries. Hours of work may change to meet the changing demands of services required</li><li>Ability to lift heavy loads</li><li>Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite, retail pharmacy software and POS systems</li><li>Excellent verbal and written communication skills with a history of outstanding customer service</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>The Benefits | </strong>We value our employees and offer a supportive and inclusive work environment.
